authority: read-only inspection of the live handoff Skill, CC Switch database, projections, and an exact upstream checkout; no authority to register a source, migrate a Skill, change a projection, update automatically, commit, or push

selectionReview.reasonSelected: smallest reviewed semantic and tree delta among the active exact-source replacement candidates without executable surfaces
semanticDelta: replace PRDs with the more general specs wording
add OpenAI display metadata and allow_implicit_invocation false
selectionReview.securityJudgment: no executable file, credential request, network action, or account authority is introduced; the Skill still writes only the requested handoff artifact to the operating-system temporary directory and requires sensitive-data redaction
selectionReview.qualityJudgment: the source delta preserves the current handoff purpose and tightens invocation control; no current safety or cross-capability boundary is removed

liveBeforeState.hashMismatchJudgment: the stored local-row hash is stale relative to the current SSOT; local rows are skipped by source update checks, but the mismatch must be captured rather than normalized silently before migration

hashBasisCorrection.difference: CRLF working-tree bytes versus LF GitHub archive bytes

operationalLimitations: the existing local handoff directory causes a fail-closed directory collision; this is an uninstall-install ownership transition, not update_skill
CC Switch stores a moving branch name and downloads refs/heads archives; it does not persist the reviewed commit pin
the current updater is non-atomic and automatic update is excluded from this first canary
the current database hash is stale relative to the local SSOT and must remain explicit in the before-state evidence

beforeMutation: create and hash a consistent database backup
create and verify a separate exact backup of the local handoff SSOT and both projection identities
re-read remote main and abort unless it still equals 9603c1cc8118d08bc1b3bf34cf714f62178dea3b
recompute the live row, tree, file, and projection hashes and abort on any drift
boundedMutation: register mattpocock/skills main only if still absent
uninstall only local:handoff through the backup-producing CC Switch path
restore the prior Claude and Codex enablement flags without enabling any other consumer
acceptanceChecks: the exact expected source-backed row is the only handoff row
the SSOT tree and both file hashes equal the reviewed target state
Claude and Codex projections remain symbolic links to the same SSOT and resolve to the target hashes
all unrelated Skill and repository rows remain unchanged
the pre-change backups remain readable until explicit acceptance
rollback: uninstall only the exact source-backed handoff row
restore the verified local handoff backup and its local row metadata
restore only the prior Claude and Codex projections
remove the newly registered source only if it was added by this canary and no other installed Skill references it
use the consistent database backup only while writes remain quiesced and only if exact application-level recovery cannot restore the captured state

decision.nextGate: separate owner authorization for this exact one-Skill transaction after reviewing the before-state and rollback preview

nonActions: no CC Switch source was registered or enabled
no Skill row, SSOT, projection, backup, Hook, MCP, Plugin, App, AGENTS, rules, or consumer configuration was changed
no third-party Skill body was executed
